connector.description: Consume data from any AMQP 1.0 compliant message broker by using the Apache Qpid JMS client. For SSL/TLS connections, use the amqps:// scheme in the remoteURI and configure SSL transport options as query parameters (e.g. transport.trustStoreLocation, transport.trustStorePassword, transport.keyStoreLocation, transport.keyStorePassword, transport.verifyHost, transport.trustAll).

camel.kamelet.jms-amqp-10-source.destina.name: camel.kamelet.jms-amqp-10-source.destinationType
camel.kamelet.jms-amqp-10-source.destina.description: The JMS destination type (queue or topic).

camel.kamelet.jms-amqp-10-source.remoteU.name: camel.kamelet.jms-amqp-10-source.remoteURI
camel.kamelet.jms-amqp-10-source.remoteU.description: The JMS URL. Use the amqps:// scheme for SSL/TLS connections. Example: amqp://my-host:31616
